item.name: Approved Grade 4 Skybuilders' Ghost Faerie
item.description:
While some wavekin are able to change their color to blend in with their surroundings, the ghost faerie takes this one step further by being almost entirely transparent. In a cruel twist of fate, this also makes it almost impossible for them to find a mate, which goes some way to explaining their scarcity.

※Not included in the fish guide.
